title: Midday CLI JSON envelope
description: Every `midday <verb> --json` invocation emits exactly one JSON object on stdout conforming to this schema. Verb-specific payload fields live at the top level next to the envelope fields (exit tests address them as `.name`, `.ticks`, `.first_divergent_tick`, ...). Exit codes: 0 ok, 1 failed assertion/build/runtime, 2 usage, 3 validation.

ok.description: True iff the verb succeeded; always equals (exit_code == 0).

verb.description: The verb that produced this envelope. For usage errors before verb resolution this is the empty-verb sentinel "-".

exit_code.description: Process exit code: 0 ok, 1 failure, 2 usage, 3 validation.

code.description: Stable machine-readable error identifier, dotted lowercase (e.g. "usage.unknown_verb", "selftest.failed").
